code_dossier.name: UpdateEmailRequest.java
code_dossier.description: A Data Transfer Object (DTO) used to encapsulate the request payload for updating a user's email address in the account management system.

data.detailed_description:
UpdateEmailRequest is a simple Data Transfer Object (DTO) class located in the account-api module of the account-management system. It serves as a request payload container for email update operations.

The class leverages Lombok's @Data annotation to automatically generate boilerplate code including:
- Getter methods for userId and email fields
- Setter methods for userId and email fields
- equals() and hashCode() methods
- toString() method
- Default no-args constructor

This DTO is designed to be used in API layer communications, likely as a request body in REST API endpoints that handle user email updates. It follows the standard DTO pattern by containing only data fields without business logic, ensuring clean separation between data transport and business processing layers.

The class resides in the 'dto' package, indicating its role as a data carrier between system boundaries (typically between frontend/client and backend services or between microservices). Its placement in the 'account-api' module suggests it's part of a shared API contract that may be consumed by multiple services or clients.
responsibilities: Encapsulate email update request data for API communication
Provide type-safe data transfer between client and server layers
Define the contract/schema for email update API requests
Enable serialization/deserialization of email update payloads

interfaces.name: UpdateEmailRequest
interfaces.description: DTO class for carrying user email update request data with userId and email fields
